note: Golden vectors for the observed-rule-v1 hash domain (proposal P0.36/P0.53). Digest = SHA-256(domainTag || 0x00 || JCS(payload)), lowercase hex. PROVISIONAL FIELD SET: the payload is exactly the R0 evaluator-consumed ObservedRuleSpec (text, applicability, effect, forbiddenRootRelativePath). When the schema/identity contract freezes the fuller observed-rule-v1 field family, these vectors rotate. The domain-separation machinery is final; the field set is not.

vectors.label: notes-pilot-action-glob

spec.text: Notes and design docs MUST go in the standalone vault, never the repo notes directory.

vectors.jcs: {"applicability":{"matcher":{"field":"file_path","glob":"*.md"},"mode":"action","tools":["Edit","Write"]},"effect":"PROHIBIT","forbiddenRootRelativePath":"notes","text":"Notes and design docs MUST go in the standalone vault, never the repo notes directory."}
